LanguageData.SD_AIOverwatch_Desc:
P.I.A has taken control of the orbital defense system and is continuously scanning for hostile targets.

If enemies appear and there is no friendly fire risk, the orbital fleet will automatically strike.

Time remaining: {0} seconds
LanguageData.SD_AIOverwatch_AlreadyActive: P.I.A orbital overwatch is already active ({0} seconds remaining). Request ignored.
LanguageData.SD_AIOverwatch_Engaged: P.I.A orbital overwatch engaged for {0} seconds.
LanguageData.SD_AIOverwatch_SystemActive: [P.I.A Overwatch] System active. Time remaining: {0} seconds.
LanguageData.SD_AIOverwatch_FriendlyFireAbort: [P.I.A Overwatch] Strike on {0} aborted due to friendly fire risk.
LanguageData.SD_AIOverwatch_MassiveCluster: [P.I.A Overwatch] Massive hostile cluster detected ({0} targets). Combined strike incoming.
LanguageData.SD_AIOverwatch_EngagingLance: [P.I.A Overwatch] Firing lance at hostile cluster ({0} targets).
LanguageData.SD_AIOverwatch_EngagingCannon: [P.I.A Overwatch] Firing cannon salvo at hostile cluster ({0} targets).
LanguageData.SD_AIOverwatch_EngagingMinigun: [P.I.A Overwatch] Firing minigun strafe at hostile group ({0} targets).
LanguageData.SD_AIOverwatch_FleetCalled: [P.I.A Overwatch] Fleet has arrived in orbit.
